title: Subcontractor Margin Leak Detector
description: Industrial-grade tool to detect and quantify margin erosion in subcontractor operations, based on ISO 9001, Lean, Six Sigma, and WERC standards.

businessContext_i18n.tr: Üzerinde anlaşılan toplam taşeron sözleşme tutarı.

inputs.label: Actual Labor Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total labor cost incurred by subcontractor.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total labor cost incurred by subcontractor.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Taşeron tarafından oluşan toplam işçilik maliyeti.

inputs.label: Actual Material Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total material cost incurred by subcontractor.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total material cost incurred by subcontractor.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Taşeron tarafından oluşan toplam malzeme maliyeti.

inputs.label: Overhead Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Overhead as percentage of direct costs (ISO 9001 cost accounting).

businessContext_i18n.en: Overhead as percentage of direct costs (ISO 9001 cost accounting).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğrudan maliyetlerin yüzdesi olarak genel gider (ISO 9001 maliyet muhasebesi).

inputs.label: Quality Rework Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of rework due to non-conformance (Six Sigma DMAIC).

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of rework due to non-conformance (Six Sigma DMAIC).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uygunsuzluk nedeniyle yeniden işleme maliyeti (Altı Sigma DMAIC).

inputs.label: Schedule Delay Penalty
inputs.businessContext: Penalties incurred due to late delivery (Lean just-in-time).

businessContext_i18n.en: Penalties incurred due to late delivery (Lean just-in-time).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geç teslimat nedeniyle oluşan cezalar (Yalın tam zamanında).

inputs.label: Waste Factor (Lean Muda)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated waste as percentage of total direct costs (Lean manufacturing).

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated waste as percentage of total direct costs (Lean manufacturing).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam doğrudan maliyetlerin yüzdesi olarak tahmini israf (Yalın üretim).

rules.condition: contract_type == 'Fixed Price' && actual_labor_cost + actual_material_cost + actual_equipment_cost > contract_value * 0.9
rules.message: Direct costs exceed 90% of contract value for fixed-price contract. High risk of margin leak.
Labor efficiency index below 0.7 indicates significant productivity loss.
Waste factor exceeds 15% threshold. Investigate Lean muda sources.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
